commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get mpijob uccl-ep-upstream -n efa-validation -o jsonpath="{.status.conditions}" 2>&1; echo'
echo === workspace log in launcher pod ===

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'LAUNCHER=$(kubectl --context ohio get pods -n efa-validation -l training.kubeflow.org/job-name=uccl-ep-upstream,training.kubeflow.org/job-role=launcher -o jsonpath="{.items[0].metadata.name}"); echo launcher=$LAUNCHER; kubectl --context ohio exec -n efa-validation $LAUNCHER -- cat /workspace/out/uccl-upstream.log 2>&1 | head -300'
